content:
I would like to highlight that this community is awesome! I want to thank you all very much for facilitating and supporting the entry of new members. Congratulations!

Thanks to everyone’s willingness to share knowledge and provide constructive feedback. Your support and quick response time to my questions have been crucial to my development and the approval of my patches.

A special thanks to the reviewers, maintainers and @Alice Ryhl, whose hard work and dedication ensure that the community continues to grow and thrive. You have made my journey in Rust for Linux extremely rewarding.

If all open source communities were like this, it would be amazing!

You are doing an excellent job!
Thank you very much!
